blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
